zh.lifeSummary: 當Cunégonde de Lorraine於大約1173年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫斯泰特雷吉 亞琛蒙沙武時，她的父親Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine31歲，母親Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast29歲。她和Walram van Limburg III至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1214年享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

en.lifeSummary: When Cunégonde de Lorraine was born about 1173, in Monschau, Städteregion Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, was 31 and her mother, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, was 29. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Walram van Limburg III. She died in 1214, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cunégonde de Lorraine est née environ 1173, à Monschau, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Walram van Limburg III. Elle est décédée en 1214, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cunégonde de Lorraine um 1173 in Monschau, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine 31 und ihre Mutter Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast 29. Sie hatte mit Walram van Limburg III mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1214 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cunégonde de Lorraine è nata il circa 1173 nel Monschau, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Walram van Limburg III. Morì nel 1214, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cunégonde de Lorraineが約1173年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンストaテレジオン アーチェンモンスチャウで生まれた時，父Ferry Ier duc de Lorraineは31歳，母Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piastは29歳であった。彼女はWalram van Limburg IIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1214年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cunégonde de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1173년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 스트a드테레조 아악헨 몬샤우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Walram van Limburg III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cunégonde de Lorraine родилась около 1173 г. в местности монщао, стaдтирегион аачэн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Walram van Limburg III. Она умерла в 1214 г. в возрасте 42 лет.
